signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Approved, Slashing Finality to 200ms | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Approved, Slashing Finality to 200ms | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana validators approved the Alpenglow upgrade last week, redesigning consensus to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to under 200 milliseconds, enabling high-frequency trading and real-time payments—positioning Solana ahead of Ethereum's L1 and L2 latency for consumer apps[1][2].
